# Tasks.AI

> Teach once. Automate forever. Tasks.AI changes the unit of automation from code
> to demonstration: show a digital coworker how you do a browser task once, and it
> does it for you forever — in your own browser, on your own accounts, with your
> data and know-how staying yours.

## What it is
- Teach by demonstration (record a task while you talk through it), it learns the
  goal, then runs hands-free — and self-heals when sites change.
- Learn a task once (~$1, ~90s); replay it for free, for life, because it runs
  locally on your machine.
- Built on trust, not hope: you taught it, you can watch every step, it's verified,
  repeatable, local, and yours to keep, edit, and share.
- For the browser work that runs the business — finance, operations, RevOps, HR,
  support — and anyone who can do the job in a browser.

## Mission
Make agentic AI accessible to everyone, so every company can capture, protect, and
grow the know-how that makes it valuable.

## Status
Pre-launch. A skills marketplace ("an app store for work") is coming. Backed by a
filed provisional patent (priority date January 23, 2026).

## Links
- Site: https://tasks-ai-inc.github.io/
- Contact: hello@tasks.ai
